CIML Meeting2023October 17, 2023

🇹🇭 Chiang Mai, Thailand

58th CIML Meeting — Resolutions (EN)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml58
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-58

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
aChiang Mai, ThailandDiscussed
b17–19 October 2023Discussed
1Opening remarks and roll callDiscussed
2Adoption of the agendaAdopted
3Approval of the minutes of the 57th CIML MeetingAdopted
4Report by the CIML PresidentDiscussed
5CIML First Vice-President (2024–2030)Discussed
6Presentation by the candidate for CIML Second Vice-President (2023–2029)Discussed
7Report by the BIML Director on BIML matters and activitiesDiscussed
8Renewal of the contract of Mr Anthony Donnellan, BIML DirectorDiscussed
9Renewal of the contract of Mr Ian Dunmill, BIML Assistant DirectorDiscussed
10Financial mattersDiscussed
11OIML publications and technical activitiesDiscussed
12OIML Certification System (OIML-CS)Discussed
13CEEMS Advisory Group (CEEMS AG)Discussed
14OIML Digitalisation Task Group (OIML DTG)Discussed
15International cooperationDiscussed
16Election and decisions on the renewal of contracts (secret ballots)Discussed
17OIML AwardsDiscussed
1859th CIML MeetingDiscussed
19Any other businessDiscussed
20Review and approval of draft CIML resolutionsAdopted
21Closing remarksDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
